title: Pasaje Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Pasaje, with a Z-Score of +4.43. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Pasaje is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53%, and the wind speed is 7.6 km/h, which is not providing significant relief. 
 The city is experiencing no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating the dominance of high temperatures.
conclusion: Activate emergency response plans to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
